title: Jinbe Begins the Story
description: On pages 17–17, this part follows Narrator, Unknown person #1, Jinbe, Fisher Tiger, Queen Otohime, King Neptune, Robin. The core story beat is jinbe begins the story.
scene: The scene centers on jinbe begins the story, with Narrator, Unknown person #1, Jinbe, Fisher Tiger, Queen Otohime, King Neptune, Robin driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: O: I don't want your signature. Still, the only thing I can say in response to this point- out is impressive. Amazing how you noticed such a small thing. If there was something I have to say, it'd be the fact I don not necessarily want your signature.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Usopp Gallery Pirates, SBS, or fanletters for me go to "Manga" address

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Fan letters to anime staff as well as the voice actors, etc. go to the "Anime" address. See you in the next volume!

summary: Jinbe Begins the Story. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
